race.comment: SUPIDO EXPRESS (1) jumped a $2.70 chance bat the end of last campaign but bled when beaten a long way. He's trialled well coming into this assignment and while he hasn't won for  awhile, he was beaten in two photo finished last campaign. Can get back to winning form on resumption. SHE'S HOT (4) is another first-up today with two trials in her belt coming into this. Her form last campaign makes for good reading, including a first-up win over this trip. May need some luck from the draw, but she looks a nice filly on the way up. CONDUCIVE (10) got the job done on the heavy deck fresh at Albany when sitting on the speed as a $1.60 favourite. She's likely to be better for that run and her SP and figure there suggests she's up to this grade. GREAT PROMISE (5) is third-up now and worth plenty of thought. REBELS (8) wasn't far away first-up and can't be discounted.
